errors.mobile_number_required: The mobile number field is required.
errors.mobile_number_invalid: Invalid number. Please insert correct number.
errors.password_min_length: The password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.password_max_length: The password must be at maximum 40 characters.

paragraph_1.segment_1: In case of any concerns or grievance against tickets purchased through the e-ticket website or Rail Sheba app, a passenger should notify Bangladesh Railway within 2 hours by sending an email along with the e-ticket details to

paragraph_2.segment_1: For any other grievance including tickets purchased from counters or any sort of inconvenience caused at stations or trains during their travel, passengers are requested to raise their complaints to Bangladesh Railway through the concerned Guard. Any such complaint must be supported by the corresponding tickets. Such grievances will be strictly regulated by Bangladesh Railways Act, 1890 (Act IX of 1890) and

paragraph_3.segment_1: I acknowledge that I have fully read, understand and agree to the

refund_policy.title: REFUND POLICY
refund_policy.policy_item_1: For a refund of successfully purchased tickets, the Client or Passenger or Purchaser of the e-tickets must visit their respective originating station (i.e., Departure Station from which the Client-Passenger will travel) and contact the refund counter. Bangladesh Railway or Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV will not be held responsible for the non-issuance of tickets or delay of refund due to errors in payment processing or any other reasons that are beyond the control of Bangladesh Railway or Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV.

domestic_ticket.title: Domestic Ticket
domestic_ticket.return_policy_item_1: In case of ticket return 48 hours prior to the commencement of the journey, BDT 40 or 10% of the ticket fare, whichever is more will be deducted;
domestic_ticket.return_policy_item_2: In case of less than 48 hours and more than 24 hours, BDT 40 or 25% of the ticket fare, whichever is more will be deducted;
domestic_ticket.return_policy_item_3: In case of less than 24 hours and more than 12 hours, BDT 40 or 50% of the ticket fare, whichever is more will be deducted;
domestic_ticket.return_policy_item_4: For less than 12 hours and more than 06 hours, BDT 40 or 75% of the ticket fare, whichever is more will be deducted;
domestic_ticket.return_policy_item_5: No refund for less than 06 hours;
domestic_ticket.return_policy_item_6: Service charges for online purchase are non-refundable.

international_ticket.title: International Ticket
international_ticket.return_policy_item_1: In case of ticket return 120 hours prior to the commencement of the journey, BDT 40 for the AC Class, BDT 20 for the First Class, and BDT 15 for the other Classes will be deducted;
international_ticket.return_policy_item_2: In case of less than 120 hours and more than 96 hours, 50% of the ticket fare will be deducted;
international_ticket.return_policy_item_3: In case of less than 96 hours and more than 72 hours, 75% of the ticket fare will be deducted;
international_ticket.return_policy_item_4: No refund for less than 72 hours;
international_ticket.return_policy_item_5: Service charges for online purchase are non-refundable.

refund_policy.policy_item_3: In case any Card/Wallet is charged and/or Payment Gateway fails to return the information in due time, it is possible that the passenger's Card/Wallet would be charged without being issued for the desired tickets. In such instances, Payment Gateways will automatically refund the purchased amount by the Client-Passenger to their respective Card/Wallet within 8 (eight) working days.

policy_item_4.segment_1: However, in case such a Client-Passenger does not receive refund within 8 (eight) working days, the client Client-Passenger is requested to send a complaint email to
policy_item_4.segment_2: with details of the issue. A reply to such a Client-Passenger will be sent within 7 working days. Due to the dependency on payment service providers, it might take several days to resolve the issue.

refund_policy.policy_item_5: For a refund of unsuccessful purchases and card charging issues, Client-Passenger must contact the Payment Service Provider through which s/he made the transaction.
refund_policy.policy_item_6: Advance tickets for Eid travel are non-refundable.

policy_item_7.refund_instruction_item_1: Online refund is applicable for railway tickets purchased from e-tickets website and Rail Sheba app only.
policy_item_7.refund_instruction_item_2: You can click on the refund button for the desired ticket from purchase history, submit OTP sent to your mobile number for confirmation, and the refund process will be started.
policy_item_7.refund_instruction_item_3: The refund will be disbursed within a few days.
policy_item_7.refund_instruction_item_4: Please note once the OTP confirmation is sent, the booked seat(s) for the selected PNR will be released.
policy_item_7.refund_instruction_item_5: If any of your online ticket is printed from the counter before the journey date it will not be eligible for refund from the online refund system. It will be eligible for refund from the station counters only.

refund_policy.policy_item_8: For trains cancelled between 18 July 2024 to 29 July 2024, refund requests can be submitted till 10 days starting from 15 Aug 2024, 09:00 am. For such refunds, the actual timeline to process the refund (8 business days) may vary depending upon availability of funds.
refund_policy.service_charge_non_refundable_note: *Service Charge is charged by the service provider and it is non-refundable.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.item_1: E-tickets will be automatically issued by Bangladesh Railway Portal within 30 minutes of successful payment. User(s) can obtain their ticket(s) and also download the PDF version of the ticket from the confirmation page. Concurrently, a copy of the ticket will be sent to the user's email address. However, some mail service providers such as Gmail, Yahoo!, Outlook might place the email in “SPAM” folder. Furthermore, it might also be possible that the mail has been blocked by any of the mentioned service providers. However, email containing PDF tickets may be delayed for technical reasons. Therefore, unavailability of the confirmation mail should not be regarded as non-issuance of ticket. If the reservation does not materialize and the client-passenger still wants to try for the same reservation once again, the process will be treated as a new reservation. User(s) can always download the tickets from the “Purchase History” section of the website or “My Tickets” section of Rail Sheba app.

item_2.title: Ticket purchase limitation per day
item_2.subtitle: Bangladesh Railway passengers
item_2.list_item_1: Can purchase maximum 4 tickets (seats) in a single transaction. The transaction can be online or at the ticket booking counter at stations.

list_item_2.title: Can do maximum of 2 transactions per day.
list_item_2.list_item_1: Maximum of 8 tickets can be purchased per day.
list_item_2.list_item_2: Train numbers should be different for those two transactions.
list_item_2.list_item_3: Origin stations should be different for those two transactions.
list_item_2.list_item_4: Destination stations should be different for those two transactions.

item_3.title: Ticket purchase limitation for Eid journey
item_3.details: For journey dates (24th to 28th June 2023), users can do only 1 transaction and purchase maximum 4 seat(s). Same rule is applicable for the return journey dates (30th June to 6th July 2023) - users can do only 1 transaction and purchase maximum 4 seats.

item_4.segment_1: To issue railway tickets, Bangladesh Railway Portal depends on different payment getaways for the Card/Wallet charge information. Bangladesh Railway does not store any sensitive information of Passengers such as Card/Wallet details, OTP, Pin Code. In case any Card/Wallet is charged and/or Payment Gateway fails to return the information in due time, it is possible that the passenger's Card/Wallet would be charged without being issued for the desired tickets. In such instances, Payment Gateways will automatically refund the purchased amount by the Client-Passenger to their respective Card/Wallet within 8 (eight) working days. However, in case such a Client-Passenger does not receive refund within 8 (eight) working days, the client Client-Passenger is requested to send a complaint email to
item_4.segment_2: with details of the issue. A reply to such a Client-Passenger will be sent within 7 working days. Due to the dependency on payment service providers, it might take several days to resolve the issue. For a refund of unsuccessful purchases and card charging issues, Client-Passenger must contact the Payment Service Provider through which s/he made the transaction. For a refund of successfully purchased tickets, the Client-Passenger must visit their respective originating station (i.e., Departure Station from which the Client-Passenger will travel) and contact the refund counter. Bangladesh Railway or Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV will not be held responsible for the non-issuance of tickets or delay of refund due to errors in payment processing or any other reasons that are beyond the control of Bangladesh Railway or Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV. Bangladesh Railway makes no guarantee/warranty that any of the above services will be uninterrupted, timely or error-free due to the dependencies on many Service Providers.

item_5.segment_1: In case of any concerns or grievance against tickets purchased through the e-ticket website or Rail Sheba app, a passenger should notify Bangladesh Railway within 2 hours by sending an email along with the e-ticket details to

item_6.segment_1: For any other grievance including tickets purchased from counters or any sort of inconvenience caused at stations or trains during their travel, passengers are requested to raise their complaints to Bangladesh Railway through the concerned Traveling Ticket Examiner (“TT”). Any such complaint must be supported by the corresponding tickets. Such grievances will be strictly regulated by Bangladesh Railways Act, 1890 (Act IX of 1890) and

item_7.title: Ticket purchase, refund and journey rules & regulations
item_7.list_item_1: This ticket is non-transferable and non-assignable.
item_7.list_item_2: It is mandatory for children between 3 to 12 years old to purchase minor tickets.

list_item_3.segment_1: No additional fees for Passengers who travel within the luggage weight limits of:
list_item_3.segment_2: AC- 56 KG, First Class- 37.5 KG, Shovon chair/ Shovon- 28 KG, Shulobh- 23 KG;

item_7.list_item_4: The coach/seat number may change during the journey due to unavoidable circumstances;

domestic_ticket.title: Domestic Ticket
domestic_ticket.list_item_1: In case of ticket return 48 hours prior to the commencement of the journey, BDT 40 or 10% of the ticket fare, whichever is more will be deducted;
domestic_ticket.list_item_2: In case of less than 48 hours and more than 24 hours, BDT 40 or 25% of the ticket fare, whichever is more will be deducted;
domestic_ticket.list_item_3: In case of less than 24 hours and more than 12 hours, BDT 40 or 50% of the ticket fare, whichever is more will be deducted;
domestic_ticket.list_item_4: For less than 12 hours and more than 06 hours, BDT 40 or 75% of the ticket fare, whichever is more will be deducted;
domestic_ticket.list_item_5: No refund for less than 06 hours;
domestic_ticket.list_item_6: Service charges for online purchase are non-refundable.
domestic_ticket.list_item_7: The refund amount will be disbursed to your respective MFS (bKash, Nagad, Rocket) or bank card (VISA / MasterCard / Nexus) within 8 business days. However, the refund to your bank cards may take longer and may vary according to your card issuer bank's refund policies.
domestic_ticket.list_item_7_bkash: The refund amount will be disbursed to your bKash account within 8 business days. However, the refund to your bank cards may take longer and may vary according to your card issuer bank's refund policies.
domestic_ticket.list_item_7_nagad: The refund amount will be disbursed to your Nagad account within 8 business days. However, the refund to your bank cards may take longer and may vary according to your card issuer bank's refund policies.

international_ticket.title: International Ticket
international_ticket.list_item_1: In case of ticket return 120 hours prior to the commencement of the journey, BDT 40 for the AC Class, BDT 20 for the First Class, and BDT 15 for the other Classes will be deducted;
international_ticket.list_item_2: In case of less than 120 hours and more than 96 hours, 50% of the ticket fare will be deducted;
international_ticket.list_item_3: In case of less than 96 hours and more than 72 hours, 75% of the ticket fare will be deducted;
international_ticket.list_item_4: No refund for less than 72 hours;
international_ticket.list_item_5: Service charges for online purchase are non-refundable.

item_7.list_item_6: Bangladesh Railway is a national resource. Do not travel by Bangladesh Railway without purchasing a ticket. Buy train tickets while traveling and encourage others to do so. Any traveling without a valid ticket may be subject to prosecution.
item_7.list_item_7: For traveling with Bangladesh Railway, the passenger must have a valid ticket. No expired ticket or ticket having a future date of travel would be valid.
item_7.list_item_8: It is the responsibility of the Client-Passenger to check the correctness of the ticket concerning the travel date and time, destination, seat number and coach details. Wrongly purchased tickets may be replaced depending on the availability of the desired destination, seat number etc.
item_7.list_item_9: Except for whatever liability is admitted by Bangladesh Railway or Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV in this terms and conditions, neither Bangladesh Railway nor Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV accepts any liability of whatever nature arising out of the rail ticket or the travel.

terms.item_8: If you are the Client-Passenger or buying the ticket on behalf of the Client-Passenger, it is required to agree with all these terms and conditions. Please read thoroughly all the terms and conditions and upon perusal, if you have understood the contents of the terms and conditions and agree to the same, please continue. Continuing constitute a formal agreement between you and the Bangladesh Railway for the purpose of transactions on this website.

item_9.title: Provision for cases in which tickets have been issued for trains not having room available for additional passengers
item_9.list_item_1: Fares shall be deemed to be accepted, and tickets to be issued, subject to the condition of there being room available on the train for which the tickets are issued.
item_9.list_item_2: A person to whom a ticket has been issued and for whom there is not room available in the train for which the ticket was issued shall on returning the ticket within three hours after the departure of the train be entitled to have his fare refunded at once.
item_9.list_item_3: A person for whom there is not room available for the class of carriage for which he has purchased a ticket and who is obliged to travel in a carriage of a lower class shall be entitled on delivering up his ticket to a refund of the difference between the fare paid by him and the fare payable for the class of carriage in which he traveled.

terms.item_10: *These Terms and Conditions may be changed or amended by Bangladesh Railway at any time without any prior notice for legal, regulatory, commercial or security reasons or to enable the proper delivery of or to improve the delivery of the proper service.

privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.section_title_1: 1. Collection of Personally Identifiable Information and other Information
privacy.section_title_3: 3. Collecting and Using Your Personal Data
privacy.paragraph_1: We, at Bangladesh Railway and Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV, ensure to maintain the highest standards of transactional security and quality so that your information and details are secure. To know more about our policies please read the following to learn about our information gathering and dissemination practices.
privacy.paragraph_2: Note: Kindly note that our privacy policy is subject to change at any time without prior notice. To ensure that you are aware of any changes, please review this policy at regular intervals.
privacy.paragraph_3: By visiting this Website, you agree to be bound by the terms and conditions of this Privacy Policy. Any disagreement will be subject to the jurisdiction of Bangladesh.
privacy.paragraph_4: By mere use of the Website, you express consent to our use and disclosure of your personal information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. This Privacy Policy is incorporated into and subject to the Terms of Use
privacy.paragraph_5: When you use our Website, we store your browsing information so that we can provide services and features that meet your needs.
privacy.paragraph_6: In general, you can browse the Website without telling us who you are or revealing any personal information about yourself. Once you give us your personal information, you are not anonymous to us. You always have the option to not provide information by choosing not to use a particular service or feature on the Website. We compile your usage behavior and personal information and the information on an aggregate basis for internal research to better enhance our product offerings to serve you better. This information may include the URL that you just came from (whether this URL is on our Website or not), which URL you next go to (whether this URL is on our Website or not), your computer browser information, and your IP address.
privacy.paragraph_7: We use data collection devices such as "cookies (small file stored on your computer)" on certain pages of the Website to help analyze our web page flow, measure promotional effectiveness, and promote trust and safety. We offer certain features that are only available through the use of a "cookie".
privacy.paragraph_8: Additionally, third parties may also place cookies or similar devices on our Website, which we cannot control. If you choose to buy on the Website, we collect information about your buying behavior.
privacy.paragraph_9: If you transact with us, we collect some additional information, such as a billing address, a credit/debit card number and a credit/debit card expiration date and/ or other payment instrument details. If you post messages or leave feedback for us, we will collect that information you provide to us. We retain this information as necessary to resolve disputes, provide customer support and troubleshoot problems as permitted by law.
privacy.paragraph_10: If you send us personal correspondence, such as emails or letters, or if other users or third parties send us correspondence about your activities or postings on the Website, we may collect such information into a file specific to you.
privacy.paragraph_11: We collect personally identifiable information (email address, name, phone number, NID) from you when you set up a free account with us. However, data protection is a matter of trust and your privacy is important to us. We shall therefore use your name and other information which relates to you in the manner set out in this Privacy Policy. We will only collect information where it is necessary for us to do so and we will only collect information
privacy.paragraph_12: We will only share personal information with companies, organizations or individuals outside the periphery of Bangladesh Railway and Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV if we have a good-faith and believe that access, use, preservation or disclosure of the information is reasonably necessary to:
privacy.paragraph_13: Meet any applicable law, regulation, legal process or enforceable governmental request. enforce applicable Terms of Service, including investigation of potential violations, detect, prevent, or otherwise address fraud, security or technical issues. protect against harm to the rights, property or safety of Bangladesh Railway and Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV, our users or the public as required or permitted by law.
privacy.paragraph_14: We may share aggregated, non-personally identifiable information publicly and with our partners – like bus operators, agents or connected sites. For example, we may share information publicly to show trends about the general use of our services. We may also share consolidated information provided by like-minded users 3rd parties without ever taking individual names, email ids or other contact details.
privacy.paragraph_15: If Bangladesh Railway and Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV is involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, we will continue to ensure the confidentiality of your personal information and give notice before personal information is transferred or becomes subject to a different privacy policy.
privacy.paragraph_16: Information Collected while Using the Application
privacy.paragraph_17: While using Our Application, in order to provide features of Our Application, We may collect, with your prior permission:
privacy.paragraph_19: Information from your Device's phone book (contacts list)
privacy.paragraph_20: Pictures and other information from your Device's camera and photo library
privacy.paragraph_21: We use this information to provide features of Our Service, to improve and customize Our Service. The information may be uploaded to the Company's servers and/or it may be simply stored on your device.
privacy.paragraph_22: You can enable or disable access to this information at any time, through Your Device settings. We don’t store or share any of your personal data to any other third-party channel. Your data security is important to us and we only process this data through Bangladesh Railway and Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV own channel to ensure features of our services.
privacy.paragraph_23: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us by email
privacy.paragraph_24: Our Website has stringent security measures in place to protect the loss, misuse, and alteration of the information under our control. Whenever you change or access your account information, we offer the use of a secure server. As informed earlier in this policy, once we receive your information, we ensure strict security guidelines to protect it against unauthorized access. For example, we use SSL security to protect users against identity theft & spyware.
privacy.paragraph_25: By using the Website and/ or by providing your information, you consent to the collection and use of the information you disclose on the Website in accordance with this Privacy Policy, including but not limited to your consent for sharing your information as per this privacy policy.
privacy.paragraph_26: We may decide to make amends to this privacy policy without prior information, therefore, it is suggested you review this page at regular intervals. This ensures you are up-to-date with the details of the information we collect, how we use it, and under what circumstances we disclose it.

railway_act.title: EXTRACT FROM BANGLADESH RAILWAY ACT
railway_act.subtitle: The Railways Act, IX of 1890 (as amended from time to time) contains provisions for dealing with the following matters, which are published for the general information namely.
railway_act.paragraph_1: No person shall be entitled to take with him, or to require a railway administration to carry, any dangerous or offensive goods upon a railway.
railway_act.paragraph_2: No person shall take any such goods with him upon railway without giving notice of their nature to the Station Master or other railway servant in charge of the place where he brings the goods upon the railway, or shall tender or deliver any such goods for carriage upon a railway without distinctly marking their nature on the outside of the package containing them or otherwise giving notice in writing of their nature to the railway servant to whom he tenders or delivers them.
railway_act.paragraph_3: Any railway servant may refuse to receive such goods for carriage, and, when such goods have been so received without such notice as is mentioned in sub-section (2) having to his knowledge been given, may refuse to carry them or may stop their transit.
railway_act.paragraph_4: If any railway servant has reason to believe any such goods to be contained in a package with respect to the contents whereof such notice as is mentioned in sub-section (2) has not to his knowledge been given. he may cause the package to be opened for the purpose of ascertaining its contents.
railway_act.paragraph_5: Nothing in this section shall be construed to derogate from the Explosives Act. 1884, or any rule under that act, and nothing in sub-sections (1), (3) and (4) shall be construed to apply to any goods tendered or delivered for carriage by order or on behalf of the Government or to any goods which an officer, soldier, sailor [airman] or police-officer, or a member of the Bangladesh Territorial Force, or of the Auxiliary Force, Bangladesh may take with him upon a railway in the course of his employment or duty as such.
railway_act.paragraph_6: Every person desirous of travelling on a railway shall, upon payment of his fare, be supplied with a ticket, specifying the class of carriage for which, and the place from and the place to which, the fare has been paid, and the amount of the fare,

paragraph_7.title: The matters required by sub-section (1) to be specified on a ticket shall be set forth-
paragraph_7.item_1: if the class of carriage to be specified thereon is the lowest class, then in a vernacular language in common use in the territory traversed by the railway, and
paragraph_7.item_2: if the class of carriage to be so specified is any other than the lowest class, then in English.

railway_act.paragraph_8: Fares shall be deemed to be accepted, and tickets to be issued, subject to the condition of there being room available in the train for which the tickets are issued.
railway_act.paragraph_9: A person to whom a ticket has been issued and for whom there is no room available in the train for which the ticket was issued, shall, on returning the ticket within three hours after the departure of the train, be entitled to have his fare at once refunded.
railway_act.paragraph_10: A person for whom there is no room available in the class of carriage for which he has purchased a ticket and who is obliged to travel in a carriage of a lower class shall be entitled on delivering up his ticket to a refund of the difference between the fare paid by him and the fare payable for the class of carriage in which he travelled.
railway_act.paragraph_11: No person shall, without the permission of a railway servant, enter or remain in any carriage on a railway for the purpose of travelling therein as a passenger unless he was with him a proper pass or ticket.
railway_act.paragraph_12: A railway servant when granting the permission referred to in sub-section (1) shall ordinarily if empowered in this behalf by the railway administration, grant to the passenger a certificate that the Passenger has been permitted to travel in such carriage upon condition that he subsequently pays the fare payable for the distance to be travelled.
railway_act.paragraph_13: A person shall not be entitled to a refund of an overcharge in respect of animals or goods carried by railway or to compensation for the loss, destruction or deterioration of animals or goods delivered to be so carried, unless his claim to the refund or compensation has been preferred in writing by him or on his behalf to the railway administration within six months from the date of the delivery of the animals or goods for carriage by railway.

booking_steps.search_instruction: Choose your origin, destination, journey dates and search for trains
booking_steps.select_instruction: Select your desired trip and choose your seats
booking_steps.pay_instruction: Pay for the tickets via Debit / Credit Cards or MFS

instructions_list.instruction_item_1: Tickets can be bought online ten days in advance.
instructions_list.instruction_item_2: You can pay for the tickets using mobile financial services: {{mobilePaymentMethods}} or debit/credit cards: Mastercard, Visa, DBBL Nexus. Other payment options will be available soon.
instructions_list.instruction_item_2_bkash: You can pay for the tickets using bKash mobile financial service.
instructions_list.instruction_item_2_nagad: You can pay for the tickets using Nagad mobile financial service.
instructions_list.instruction_item_3: In case of payment or transaction failure, the deducted amount would be refunded by your bank or MFS provider within 8 business days.
instructions_list.instruction_item_4: In case money has been deducted from your card / mobile wallet but you have not received a ticket confirmation, the deducted amount would be refunded by your bank or MFS provider within 8 business days.
instructions_list.instruction_item_5: If you have not received your ticket copy in email, kindly check your Spam / Junk folder. You can also download your ticket copy from the purchase history of your account after you login.

home.ticket_issue_information: The tickets are issued by Bangladesh Railway Integrated Ticketing System (BRITS) and Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV is responsible for designing, development, implementation, technical operation & maintenance of the system.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.paragraph_1: In case of any concerns or grievance against tickets purchased through the e-ticket website or Rail Sheba app, a passenger should notify Bangladesh Railway within 2 hours by sending an email along with the e-ticket details to support@eticket.railway.gov.bd.
disclaimer.paragraph_2: For any other grievance including tickets purchased from counters or any sort of inconvenience caused at stations or trains during their travel, passengers are requested to raise their complaints to Bangladesh Railway through the concerned Guard. Any such complaint must be supported by the corresponding tickets. Such grievances will be strictly regulated by Bangladesh Railways Act, 1890 (Act IX of 1890) and <button class='btn-tarrif' type='button' data-modal-target='railwayact'>Bangladesh Railway Coaching Tariff</button>.
disclaimer.paragraph_3: I acknowledge that I have fully read, understand and agree to the <button type='button' class='terms-conditions-btn' data-modal-target='terms'>Terms and Conditions</button> of eticket.railway.gov.bd website.

purchase.select_mode_payment: Please select your mode of Payment Method

purchase.sms_receive_checkbox_label: I want to receive SMS* alerts for my ticket

benefits_sms_alert.title: Benefits of SMS Alert Service
benefits_sms_alert.benefit_1: You will receive Ticket purchase confirmation with PNR number.
benefits_sms_alert.benefit_2: You will receive a reminder SMS {{notify_minutes}} hours prior to your scheduled journey.
benefits_sms_alert.benefit_3: You will receive train delay notification, if train is delayed by {{train_late_minute}} minutes or more.
benefits_sms_alert.benefit_4: You will receive train / coach cancellation notification, if your train / coach gets cancelled.
benefits_sms_alert.benefit_5: You will be notified when your online ticket is cancelled and refunded at station counters.

terms_consent.segment_1: By clicking on the "PROCEED TO PAYMENT" button below, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to the

purchase.payment_max_duration: Please complete your payment within {{max_duration}} minutes, otherwise your seat(s) will be cancelled.

passenger_exceeded_rules.title: Provision for case in which tickets have been issued for trains not having room available for additional passenger
passenger_exceeded_rules.rule_1: Fares shall be deemed to be accepted, and tickets to be issued, subject to the condition of there being room available in the train for which the tickets are issued.
passenger_exceeded_rules.rule_2: A person to whom a ticket has been issued and for whom there is not room available in the train for which the ticket was issued shall on returning the ticket within three hours after the departure of the train be entitled to have his fare at once refunded.
passenger_exceeded_rules.rule_3: A person for whom there is not room available for the class of carriage for which he has purchased a ticket and who is obliged to travel in a carriage of a lower class shall be entitled on delivering up his ticket to a refund of the difference between the fare paid by him and the fare payable for the class of carriage in which he traveled.

purchase.redirected_payment_gateway: You would be redirected to a third party payment gateway where you can pay with your credit or debit cards. Your payment transactions are 100% secure. On successful payment, you would get a confirmed ticket.
purchase.co_passenger_note_1: Please Note: Co-passengers' names (as given on their NID / photo ID) are mandatory to complete the ticket purchase process. All passengers MUST carry their NID / photo ID document while traveling.
purchase.complete_passenger_details: Please complete the passenger details, review and continue to the payment page within {{selectedSeatReleaseTime}} minutes, or the selected seat(s) will be released and you will have to re-initiate the booking process.
purchase.seat_purchase_limit_warning: No more than {{no_of_seats}} can be purchased at a time.
purchase.could_not_verify_otp_code: Couldn't verify otp code, invalid otp code.
purchase.enter_code_guide: Please enter the 4-digit code you received on your mobile.
purchase.otp_missing_error: Failed to continue due to missing OTP.
purchase.otp_delivery_notice: OTP delivery may be delayed due to congestion at telco or SMS Gateway's end. Shohoz-Synesis-Vincen JV is not responsible for any delay in OTP delivery.
purchase.booking_time_limit_exceed_error: Your seat(s) has been released for exceeding the time limit on the 'Passenger Details' page. Please try again!

verify_ticket.verify_ticket_guide: To verify online purchased tickets, please enter your PNR/ticket number and mobile number you used during ticket purchase. For counter purchased tickets, please enter your PNR/ticket number.
verify_ticket.the_ticket_refund_in_progress: The ticket refund is in progress
verify_ticket.meta_description: Verify your ticket by entering your PNR/Ticket Number and the mobile number used during ticket purchase.

train_information.guide_text: Please select your preferred train to see the detailed information of your selected train.
train_information.train_info_retrieval_error: Something went wrong while retrieving train information.

contact.for_refund_of_unsuccessful_purchases:
For refund of unsuccessful purchases and card
charging issues
contact.visit_your_originating_station: Visit your originating station (departure station) and contact refund counter
contact.reach_out_to_report_identity_theft: Reach out to our support team to report identity theft!
contact.registered_with_someone_else_nid: If any user has registered with someone else's NID using his/her mobile number, the real/actual NID holder can claim the identity by following the mentioned steps below
contact.must_attach_title: Must attach the following documents with the email
contact.must_attach_item_1: A scanned copy of the ownership document for the SIM (mobile number)
contact.must_attach_item_2: A scanned copy of the NID card
contact.online_refund_item_3: Find your ticket and refund it online
contact.online_refund_item_details: If any of your online ticket is printed from the counter before the journey date it will not be eligible for refund from the online refund system. It will be eligible for refund from the station counters only.
contact.counter_refund_item_1: Visit your originating station (departure station) and contact the refund counter.

please_read_refund_instruction.segment_2: Online Refund Instructions & Ticket Refund Policy

contact.meta_description: For refund and cancellation, visit your originating station (departure station) and contact the refund counter.

confirmed.ticket_confirmed_message: Hi {{contact_name}}, We have successfully confirmed your ticket!

read_the_following.title: We request you to read the following
read_the_following.evi_item_1: To receive a Bangladesh Railway printed ticket, download and show a copy of the printed ticket at the counter.
read_the_following.evi_item_2: For cancellation and refund, please show the printed ticket at the station counters.
read_the_following.evi_item_3: If your email address is not verified, you will not receive tickets via email. Please check your device’s download folder to find your PDF ticket or you can download the tickets from web or Rail Sheba app.
read_the_following.evi_item_4: You are requested to check your “Spam”/ “Junk” email folder, in case the ticket email has landed there. Please mark the email as "Not Spam" and add the sender to your trusted contact list to receive emails in your inbox in the future.
read_the_following.evi_item_5: If you have verified your email and not received your email after a few hours, please send a support request email at
read_the_following.evi_item_6: Please note that, even if you verified your email address, email containing PDF tickets may get delayed for technical reasons. In that case, you can always download your tickets from the “Purchase History” section of the website or “My Tickets” section of Rail Sheba app.
read_the_following.evni_item_1: To receive a Bangladesh Railway printed ticket, download and show a copy of the printed ticket at the counter.
read_the_following.evni_item_2: For cancellation and refund, please show the printed ticket at the station counters.
read_the_following.evni_item_3: You are requested to check your “Spam”/ “Junk” email folder, in case the ticket email has landed there. Please mark the email as "Not Spam" and add the sender to your trusted contact list to receive emails in your inbox in the future.
read_the_following.evni_item_4: If you have not received your email after a few hours, please send a support request email at
read_the_following.evni_item_5: Please note that email containing PDF tickets may be delayed for technical reasons. In that case, you can always download your tickets from the “Purchase History” section of the website or “My Tickets” section of Rail Sheba app.

payment_mode_1.reserve_confirm_sms: Reservation confirmation SMS has been sent to :contact_number
payment_mode_1.support_executive_would_call: Our support executives would call you in few hours to verify your order and delivery address. In case we are not able to reach you, your order would be cancelled automatically.
payment_mode_1.ticket_will_deliver: Your tickets will be delivered to

payment_mode_2.reserve_confirm_sms: Reservation confirmation SMS has been sent to :contact_number
payment_mode_2.you_are_not_done_yet: But you are not done yet! Please do not close the page, but follow the steps below
payment_mode_2.please_pay_through_bkash: Please pay for your tickets through bKash to our Merchant Account Number given below within next :autoCancelHour minutes, else your ticket will be cancelled.
payment_mode_2.after_paying_through_bkash: After paying through bKash, please enter the Transaction ID received from bKash below:
payment_mode_2.require_paper_printed_tickets: Most of the bus operators require paper printed tickets.
payment_mode_2.carrying_pdf_may_not_allowed: You may not be allowed to travel in case you are carrying a PDF of your ticket.
payment_mode_2.courtesy_email_sent: A courtesy email with your ticket will be sent to you in a few hours but emails MAY GET DELAYED. Hence Shohoz.com encourages you to PRINT YOUR TICKET YOURSELF.
payment_mode_2.if_do_not_get_email: If you do not get the email in few hours, you may raise a support request on our "Contact Us" page.

payment_mode_4.reserve_confirm_sms: Reservation confirmation SMS has been sent to :contact_number. Pay for your ticket with MYCash to our Merchant Account No: 01791715774 and confirm your transaction ID below within 30 minutes.
payment_mode_4.save_reservation_reference: Please save the above Reservation Reference. In case you close the page by mistake, you can always visit "bKash Verify/Print" from the menu and verify your MYCash transaction.
